comment.body:
one of my private research aimed to find a formula that provides an alternative measurement for the economists to measure supply/demand.
they mostly watch the ratio.
if supply down/demand up = prices up
if supply up/demand down = prices down...
but what is the "healthy min lvl" for each of them that should be held in order to avoid a fake inflation aka stagflation? (no growth)
